summary: A Go-based test orchestration framework with a custom runner, assertion library, schema validation, webhook reporting, and MCP integration
concerns: heavy test file proliferation across multiple agent directories
fragmented test organization with many *extra_test.go files
agent metadata commits suggest automated generation without meaningful review
suggestions: consolidate scattered test files into a coherent test suite
investigate if agent-numbered directories are artifacts that should be cleaned up
add integration tests to complement the extensive unit test coverage
document the MCP handler responsibilities and API contract
